title: Vežbanje la 98

questions.text:
Nakon što je razgovorila s Tomom, Alice je poslala kratku poruku svojoj majci:

Hey Mom, I've decided to switch jobs! I want to find a company with the best work-life balance and good career growth opportunities. I talked to my friend Tom, and he gave me a lot to think about. He told me about a few companies. One has the most structured training programs, another offers the highest salaries, and one has the most laid-back culture. That's interesting because I never thought so much about these differences before.

I think I'd really enjoy working in a place with a creative and relaxed environment. I also want a job that lets me grow but still gives me time for myself. Good to know there are companies that offer both!

Mom, I really appreciate that you always support me. I'll keep you updated! 😊💕

Šta traži Alice u kompaniji?

answers.answer: Kompanija sa dobrim balansom između posla i života, kao i uz profesionalni rast/razvoj.
Kompanija sa stroga pravilima i nema godišnjeg odmora.
answers.feedback: Alice neće izabrati kompaniju sa strogim propisima/zakonima.

answers.answer: Posao koji nudi samo visoku platu, ali bez profesionalnog rasta.
answers.feedback: Alice je takođe zainteresovana za profesionalni razvoj/rast karijere, a ne samo za platu.

answers.answer: Mesto gde može da radi sve vreme bez odmora.
answers.feedback: Alice ceni ravnotežu između posla i života, što znači da želi lično vreme.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.
explanation:
Poruka Alice jasno pokazuje da traži the best work-life balance and good career growth.

Ovo znači da želi posao koji mu omogućava lično vreme, a istovremeno i daje mogućnosti za razvoj u svojoj struci/profesiji.
